sub_modules.conv2d_default_coeffs: Combinational coefficient generator for the default 3x3 Gaussian kernel, with identity fallback for other odd kernel sizes.
sub_modules.conv2d_window_builder: Combinational zero-padded stencil window assembler from the streaming pixel history.
sub_modules.conv2d_dot_product: Combinational matrix-vector multiply-accumulate datapath for the flattened convolution window and coefficients.
sub_modules.conv2d_output_cast: Combinational output-width cast from accumulator precision to the module output width.
